Effective Tactics Spear's Soul

Once in a while, the soul's owner and 3 allied units with the greatest physical armor increase their physical armor, physical armor piercing and the damage they deal by 20% for 4 sec. every second for 4 sec. Stacks up to 4 times. They also restore 40% health every second, and deal physical damage equal to 300% of their physical armor to their targets.

Requirements: 98-100
